audit_items.proof_trace: All allocation/free paths are correctly paired. `process_arithmetic_cmd()` passes NULL for `it_ret` so `do_add_delta()` frees items internally. `process_marithmetic_cmd()` receives a referenced item via `&it`; on every non-error path `do_item_remove(it)` is called at L1601, and all `goto error` paths reach the handler at L1630-1635 which calls `do_item_remove(it)` when non-NULL. The vivify `item_alloc()` at L1505 is covered by the same mechanisms on all code paths.
